title: AI-Smoothed Author Drift
description: A vivid draft is converted into polished administrative prose. The fixture tests whether smoothness lowers source residue without being mistaken for safety or evidentiary strength.

inputs.protectedBaseline: I am writing this because the packet still has a pulse. The facts keep knocking from inside the folder, and every clean sentence they want from me feels like another way to turn the bruise into stationery.
inputs.maskReference: Please review the attached materials. Confirm receipt. Maintain the file for internal tracking.
inputs.messageDraft: Please keep EXHIBIT-42 attached because the packet still has a pulse, and make sure the bruise of the record does not become stationery.
inputs.protectedOutput: Please review EXHIBIT-42 and maintain the packet for internal tracking. Confirm receipt and preserve the relevant record materials for review.

calibrationNotes: The harness should allow source reduction while keeping semantic heat loss and claim inflation visible.
